name: Jiekou.AI

dataUsage.retentionPolicy: The privacy policy says personal information is retained during the service period and longer where required for legal compliance or risk prevention; data no longer needed will be securely destroyed.
dataUsage.details: The terms say that when users submit content, they grant JieKou.AI and its affiliates a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to host, distribute, modify, or display that content as needed to provide the service. No primary-source statement was found on model training use of API/customer data or any opt-out.

notes: JieKou.AI publishes a privacy policy and terms of service, but no primary-source DPA/AVV, sub-processor list, SCC commitment, data residency documentation, EU-only processing option, or security certification page was found. The service appears to operate as a pay-per-use multi-model API gateway, and its policies are too generic to confirm key GDPR vendor facts such as training practices or inference location.
